risk_note.tr: Adimlar Microsoft'un resmi 'Download Windows 11' (microsoft.com/software-download/windows11) sayfasindan alinmistir. Sayfa 25H2 surumune guncel. Temiz kurulum sistem diskini siler - yedek SART. Microsoft'un sundugu 3 yontemden biri secilir; lisansiniz Windows 10/11 ise dijital entitlement otomatik tanir.
risk_note.en: Steps sourced from Microsoft's official 'Download Windows 11' page (microsoft.com/software-download/windows11). Page updated to 25H2. Clean install wipes system drive - backup is MANDATORY. Choose one of Microsoft's 3 methods; if you have a Windows 10/11 license, digital entitlement is auto-detected.

prerequisites.tr: Mevcut Windows 10 surum 2004+ veya Windows 11 lisansi (Microsoft sarti)
prerequisites.en: Existing Windows 10 version 2004+ or Windows 11 license (Microsoft requirement)

prerequisites.tr: En az 9 GB bos disk alani (kurulum dosyalari)
prerequisites.en: At least 9 GB free disk space (for installation files)

prerequisites.tr: USB bellek 8 GB+ (Media Creation Tool icin)
prerequisites.en: USB drive 8 GB+ (for Media Creation Tool)

prerequisites.tr: Tum onemli dosyalarin harici diske yedegi
prerequisites.en: Backup of all important files to external drive

title.tr: Yedek listesi (kurulum tum disk verisini siler)
title.en: Backup checklist (clean install wipes all disk data)

body.tr: Belgeler, Resimler, Videolar, Masaustu, Indirilenler, tarayici bookmark'lari (export), e-posta (PST), oyun save'leri, lisans key'leri. File History veya OneDrive senkronizasyonu kontrol edin.
body.en: Documents, Pictures, Videos, Desktop, Downloads, browser bookmarks (export), email (PST), game saves, license keys. Verify File History or OneDrive sync.

title.tr: Yontem 1: Installation Assistant (mevcut PC'ye direkt yukleme)

body.tr: Microsoft sayfasindan 'Windows 11 Installation Assistant' indir, calistir. Mevcut Windows uzerinde yerinde yukseltme yapar - dosyalar korunur (varsa). Hizli ama 'temiz kurulum' degildir.
body.en: Download 'Windows 11 Installation Assistant' from Microsoft. Performs in-place upgrade over current Windows - keeps files (if you choose). Fastest but not a true 'clean install'.

title.tr: Yontem 2: Media Creation Tool (USB bootable - onerilen temiz kurulum)
title.en: Method 2: Media Creation Tool (bootable USB - recommended for clean install)

body.tr: Microsoft sayfasindan 'Create Windows 11 installation media' indir. Arac otomatik ISO indirir + USB'yi bootable yapar. USB'den boot edip sistem diskini formatlayarak temiz kurulum.
body.en: Download 'Create Windows 11 installation media' from Microsoft. Tool auto-downloads ISO + makes USB bootable. Boot from USB and format system drive for a clean install.

body.tr: Microsoft sayfasindan 'Download Windows 11 Disk Image (ISO)' bolumunden ISO indir. Rufus veya Microsoft'un kendi araciyla USB'ye yaz. Ileri kullanicilar icin - dil/edition secimi gerekir.
body.en: From Microsoft's 'Download Windows 11 Disk Image (ISO)' section. Burn to USB via Rufus or Microsoft's own tool. For advanced users - language/edition selection required.

body.tr: USB'yi tak, PC'yi yeniden baslat. BIOS/UEFI'ye gir (F2/F12/Del - uretici tusu). Boot order'da USB'yi en uste cek, kaydet, cik. Setup: dil/zaman/lisans (lokal hesap secilebilir). 'Custom: Install Windows only' > sistem diskindeki TUM bolumleri Delete > New > Next.
body.en: Plug USB, restart PC. Enter BIOS/UEFI (F2/F12/Del - vendor key). Move USB to top of boot order, save, exit. Setup: language/time/license (local account allowed). 'Custom: Install Windows only' > Delete ALL system disk partitions > New > Next.

body.tr: 1) Windows Update tum guncellemeleri yukle (3-5 restart). 2) Anakart uretici sitesinden chipset + LAN driver indir (USB ile). 3) Sonra GPU, audio, diger driver'lar. 4) Son adim: D-Medic + tercih ettiginiz uygulamalar.
body.en: 1) Run Windows Update for all updates (3-5 reboots). 2) From motherboard vendor, install chipset + LAN drivers (via USB). 3) Then GPU, audio, other drivers. 4) Final: D-Medic + your preferred apps.
